Shiny Brass Shield  
 

Lore Item Quest Item Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 8.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD DRU BRD ROG SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Shiny Brass Shield
Lore Item Quest Item Placeable
Slot: SECONDARY
AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 8.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD DRU BRD ROG SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:Shield
Light:Flameless Lantern
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:3 pp 2 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:17
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-12 08:20:22
Page Updated:Mon Jan 11th, 2021

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 15pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 10
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Crushbone
NPC Name
orc trainer

Southern Felwithe
NPC Name
Joren Nobleheart

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Crushbone
Quest Name
Screaming Mace

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Crushbone
Southern Felwithe


Uploaded December 18th, 2022 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Northern Felwithe?
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2017 at 9:25 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
Who the heck put this as being found in Northern Felwithe? If someone found it in Northern Felwithe, it is because another player sold it to a merchant there or dropped it on the ground for a noob to find.

Or maybe it was back in the days before shared bank slots when to twink you had to drop gear in a hidden place, log out, then log in your other character to pick it up and hope that nobody found it in the mean time.

Edited, Sep 9th 2017 11:30am by animekenji
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
Northern Felwithe?
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2017 at 4:26 AM Rating: Good
Drewinette
View User Forum
1,658 posts
animekenji wrote:
Who the heck put this as being found in Northern Felwithe? If someone found it in Northern Felwithe, it is because another player sold it to a merchant there or dropped it on the ground for a noob to find.

Maybe Joren Nobleheart, who also drops the shield, was moved at some point from Northern Felwithe to Southern Felwithe and the zone list wasn't updated ? Fixed, thanks.

we rae core Rules guild on stromm, we jkust play original zones and original classes and races, so this shield is basically epic to us

▲ Page top
Shiny Brass Shield Drop
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2003 at 2:13 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I have a newbie Dwarf Paladin (now level 3) on Karana server. I was hunting in Butcher Block today when someone did an OOC about free loot being on a mob in North Felwithe. It was a GHOULBANE and a SHINY BRASS SHIELD. Not wanting to look a gift horse in the mouth, I replied and ran to Felwithe and looted the No Drop sword and the shield. I didn't really pay attention to the name of the mob, though. Sorry.


Kuvwen Soulstirrer (Main)
51 Ranger (Corrupted Flame)
Karana Server

Shiny Brass Shield Drop
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2009 at 8:00 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
Must have been from back in the day when you could give items to mobs and they would still be there when the mob was killed. Ghoulbane and Shiny Brass Shield are never found in Felwithe.

Shiny Brass Shield Drop

i know its a lil delayed, but its joren nobleheart, a quest npc for a part of the enc 1.0 epic.
▲ Page top
I got lucky
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2003 at 6:45 PM Rating: Decent
Gaibban
Scholar
262 posts
went to Crushbone last night, realized there is no map, got killed, retrieved my body with the help of a lovely bard,and stumbled upon trainer hill. there I grouped with an elf and on the first trainer we saw, a shiny brass shield. we rolled, I got a 40 she got a 9. I was happy! we camped for about an hour longer, third trainer after that she had hers. She was happy! She also said she killed 50 in a week with four drops of the shield and lost the roll everytime...so is it rare? yes...Is it attainable? absolutely. =)

Edited, Sun Oct 19 23:19:05 2003
____________________________

# Sep 15 2003 at 11:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591793357336

More luck than me. I've been camping in CB for about five days now, must have killed a dozen trainers so far. No SBS's yet.


Duncandebar - 15 WAR - Tarew-Marr
▲ Page top
SBS
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2003 at 11:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591751004749
Scholar
29 posts
Well I think on my other servers most of my characters have all obtained the SBS without any problems. I figured I would level up my character on the test server and went into crushbone with my level 10 Shaman. I was able to do about an hour at a time, for about four days in a row. And today after being in there for about half hour, killed two yellow ones and one blue one, the next one was blue and he dropped the SBS. I have a happy Shaman now that also got a ding out of it, and is now 11. :) On the test server I have no PP, and kinda really needed this, so I feel very lucky.
▲ Page top

# Feb 11 2003 at 10:39 AM Rating: Default

3 posts
went there and first kill got shield. gonna give to my 4th season shaman

i got it finally after about 15+ times at lvl14.
no one really wants to buy it anymore though

▲ Page top
Drops sbs
QuoteReply
# Oct 11 2002 at 11:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782117422
23 posts
I camped the hill and 3 of 4 trainers had the shield. Didn't know it was selling for 20pp or wouldn't have just given them away...OH well.

Idiin
15th Season Ranger of Tunare
The Rathe Server
▲ Page top
I wonder
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2002 at 9:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782711376
Scholar
45 posts
I spent three days whacking the trainer every opportunity I could.
I got him 18 times.
A friend of mine got him 15-20 times.
Neither of us ever saw it drop.
During the whole time, I kept up an auction offer wanting to buy it for 20 pp, noone took up my offer.
After a day, I started shouting, asking if anyone had seen it drop. No one said yes.
After three days, a party took him out and got the shield, then sold it to me.
1 for 30+? Here's what I think:
I think he only spawns with the shield when he is triggered to do so.
The shield is, after all, part of a quest.
I'll bet when someone asks the dwarf about armour, and the dwarf asks for the shield, the next trainer has the shield.
Just my thought, but it sure would explain things.
Seriously, 30 in a row is sort of indicative that something odd is going on.
▲ Page top
RE: I wonder
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2003 at 3:14 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777648217
100 posts
I uasally get this sheild between his first couple of spawns.. Everyone says that it takes them hours to get this sheild.. Every time i go to CB to help out some lower level characters with there screaming mace quest this ends up dropping and i give it away.This sheild only takes me bout half an hour before it drops for me i guess im just lucky.

Tebil Poizenpoint
Rogue of the Drinal server
Punch and Pie (::)

Edited, Sun Jan 5 02:49:20 2003
▲ Page top
RE: I wonder
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2003 at 4:40 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Well, I have gotten this shield in 3 or 4 kills, when playing around in CB with my main, or higher level alts., However, when I wanted it for an alt druid on a different server, where I actually needed the shield, it took several hours to get it.

It random, sometimes 2 in a row pop with it, sometimes you wait for hours.
▲ Page top
RE: I wonder
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2003 at 10:24 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1688948237917
View User Forum
236 posts
On the FV Server, got a drop last nite from Trainer. My 14 Warrior Human would run up the hill cons green all around. I kill them all and wait for trainer. Got a yellow cons trainer. That corpsed me but good. Upon CR, the yellow cons trainer was still at his post. So I wacked him again pulling to the low slop. Killed Yellow this time with less than 30 perc HP on me. Next was Yellow, killed that with no Corpse. Next spawn was Blue cons trainer, but I took notice that area around the trainers body glowed. With sheer delight, human warrior pounded into submission and got a SBS!!! Sweet shout!!! Now warrior sees better in CB.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 29 2002 at 2:56 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this is so funny...i been looking at like lvl 46-70 mobs alot lately and i come here and bunches o people thinkin they lucky they got a 10 ac 10 sv magic shield i don't mean to make fun of you guys but its quite a change from 30 ac rings to 3 ac bracers hehe, btw if your on the saryrn server i'm gonna head to this zone and kill everything in it soon because it looks like that would be a fun thing to do >:)
luck
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2002 at 11:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254990612
View User Forum
13 posts
one of my first times in CB and I am a lvl 9 ranger, group with some lvl 11s and go to hill. We kill trainer i loot him and shield pops. We rool dice and i am LUCKY enough to win it. This was my first time the shield popped when i was there.
▲ Page top
now lore item
QuoteReply
# May 24 2002 at 8:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778034421
7 posts
This shield is now a lore item, which means you have to sell one before you can go for another. A friend and I were hunting on orc hill to get the shield to equip it. We waited a few hours before it dropped. The next day, we went up there again. The trainer was up, we took him down, and he had the shield. The next trainer that popped had a shield as well. It's just luck of the draw. We had to sell the one on the trainer corpse for 8 pp since I already had a shield.
▲ Page top
shield
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2002 at 11:20 AM Rating: Decent

I was up on trainer hill saw a trainer dead on the ground checked him and got myself a brand new shiny shield. Just dumb luck on my part.

Drop Rate
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2002 at 12:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758496402
6 posts
Agree that it is down to luck how often the trainer drops the SBS. If you clear the orcs on trainer hill, the trainer pops approx once every 10 minutes. I fought the trainer for 5-6 hours a few times without the shield dropping. Have seen other players fight the trainer and get the shield first time. Its a nice shield, my druid used it until they got a CGS.

True it's not rare, it's just luck of the draw, i have like 6 of these shields so I use 1, and I sold the rest.

# Dec 31 2001 at 4:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766939088

Despite what it says here at Alakazams it is NOT usable by Beast Lord. I purchased one today without looking at the details, based on this site. Now I think I'll give it away to some low level char as my BeastLord can't use it.

SBS
QuoteReply
# Nov 27 2001 at 1:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758534846
2 posts
I just camped the trainer for almost 7 hours. He dropped the shield only once. I killed him over 20 times, but when I camped this guy with a different char, he dropped the shield 5 times in about 1.5 hours. Just the luck of the draw I guess.
▲ Page top
+10 Sv Magic
QuoteReply
# Nov 26 2001 at 10:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251338844
15 posts
I bought one of these for 20pp today. I couldn't believe my luck in running across this. There are times when u need as much Sv Magic as possible. I gladly gave the guy 20pp for an extra ten Sv Magic. U can't beat it for the price. = )

▲ Page top
1 HS
QuoteReply
# Nov 21 2001 at 7:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771805157
36 posts
Dunno if this is true but, a mage and I camped him for hours, killed him like 20 times and he never dropped the shield. I was using my 2HS axe at the time. We gave up and left. Later I came back alone with my 1HS fine steel and kite shield. Soloed him and he dropped the shield second kill. Maybe it only drops if you can use the item, dunno. He wont be holding it. You'll only find out when you loot him. It's lore too.

Two more levels and I get dual weild, then bye bye SBS.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 18 2001 at 7:35 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) its not rare
